        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "4, ['Premium Insurance Membership (freelancer support membership with discount and advisor) not covered by any template field', 'Freelancer Liability & Support or Professional Liability Add-on (legal defense and negligence coverage) not representable in template', 'Request to prepare a version reducing total cost to target budget (€185) not directly expressible (no field for custom optimization request)', 'Explicit reference to compliance with German freelancer regulations (regulatory compliance statement) not captured in template']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "14, ['Health insurance plan options (VitalPlus, HealthFirst, SecureLife, InsurePlus) with cost, coverage tier, deductible, and quality rating', 'Mental health coverage including therapy, psychiatry, crisis support, and stress management (health_insurance_specific fields)', 'Property and equipment protection plans (HomeFirst, LifeFirst, CareCo) with electronics coverage, coverage limits, and quality rating', 'Travel and adventure insurance options (VitalPlus, InsurePlus) with medical evacuation, trip cancellation, and adventure sports coverage', 'Coverage tiers and plan types (basic, standard, premium) mapped to insurance_plans.coverage_tier', 'Monthly cost and total cost values (monthly_cost, currency)', 'Global coverage and geographic coverage (Berlin, Germany with global coverage yes)', 'Emergency support and customer support hours (24/7 multilingual support)', 'Documentation and confirmation details (confirmation_number issued, policy_number issued, digital_documents yes)', 'Policy activation and coverage start date (policy_timeline.new_coverage_start)', 'Availability status (plan currently available yes, immediate enrollment)', 'Cost comparison and savings (monthly_savings, cost_comparison lower)', 'Family coverage indication (family_coverage_included yes)', 'Service features like dedicated agent, priority claims, online portal, and global assistance']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 4, ['Premium Insurance Membership (freelancer support membership with discount and advisor) not covered by any template field', 'Freelancer Liability & Support or Professional Liability Add-on (legal defense and negligence coverage) not representable in template', 'Request to prepare a version reducing total cost to target budget (€185) not directly expressible (no field for custom optimization request)', 'Explicit reference to compliance with German freelancer regulations (regulatory compliance statement) not captured in template']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
